options.content:
# Juddges — Web Vitals — not yet wired up

**Blocked:** The app_events table does not exist yet (its creation is a separate, not-yet-landed issue).

### Intended tiles
- LCP / INP / CLS p75
- Per-route breakdown

### What it needs
Land the app_events table + frontend track() wrapper, then add SQL panels computing p75 per metric/route. Follow-up to #196.

_This placeholder is committed so the dashboard set is complete and reviewable; it renders cleanly (text only) and carries no panels that would error against a datasource that does not exist yet._
